package org.slf4j;

// Adversarial: FQN-shaped call to an in-file decoy Logger; tier-1 must never
// match a static-shaped qualifier (slf4j error/warn are instance methods).
class Logger {
    static void error(String msg, Throwable cause) {}
}

class FqnDecoyTier1 {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            org.slf4j.Logger.error("x", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
